chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 153 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections No.7&8. 2. For hearing of CMA 103/2024. 3. For hearing of CMA 1000/2016. 4. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025. Mr. Asad Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = Counsel for the applicant on instructions no longer wishes to press this Revision. Accordingly, this Revision Application alongwith pending applications stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Tufail
